prompt: 你幫我做 spark 2 的 firmware updater , 但是比目前的 dev 版本還要再舊一個版本  windows , mac 都要  好了以後slack mac 的 link 給Bo Chiu

input.description: Confirm jenkins.sh helper and token exist

input.command: cd D:/mybot && bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh info REACTOR_SPARK_FW_UPDATER_WIN_OSX 2>&1 | head -80

prompt: 算了你build mac 版就好了

input.command: cd D:/mybot && bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh jobs 2>&1 | tr ',' '\n' | grep -iE 'spark|SPARK' | grep -iE 'name' | head -40

cd D:/mybot && for j in SPARK_II_FW SPARK_ESP32_FW; do echo "===== $j ====="; bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh info "$j" "tree=builds[number,result,description]{0,8}" 2>&1 | tr '}' '\n' | grep -iE 'number|result|description' | head -40; done
input.description: Get recent build versions for Spark 2 MCU and ESP jobs

input.command: cd D:/mybot && bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh info REACTOR_SPARK_FW_UPDATER_OSX "tree=property[parameterDefinitions[name,type,defaultParameterValue[value],choices]]" 2>&1 | tr ',' '\n' | grep -iE 'name|value|choices|Choice|Boolean|String' | head -60
input.description: Get Mac-only OSX updater job params

input.command: cd D:/mybot && for j in SPARK_II_FW SPARK_ESP32_FW REACTOR_SPARK_FW_UPDATER_OSX; do echo "===== $j ====="; bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh info "$j" 2>&1 | tr ',' '\n' | grep -iE 'lastSuccessfulBuild|lastStableBuild"' | head -4; done

cd D:/mybot && for j in SPARK_II_FW SPARK_ESP32_FW; do echo "===== $j ====="; bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh info "$j" "tree=lastSuccessfulBuild[number],builds[number,result]" 2>&1 | tr '{' '\n' | grep -oiE '"number":[0-9]+|"result":"[A-Z]+"' | head -20; done

cd D:/mybot && for b in 56 55; do echo "=== SPARK_II_FW #$b ==="; bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh build SPARK_II_FW $b "tree=artifacts[fileName],description" 2>&1 | tr ',' '\n' | grep -iE 'fileName|description'; done; for b in 87 86; do echo "=== SPARK_ESP32_FW #$b ==="; bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh build SPARK_ESP32_FW $b "tree=artifacts[fileName],description" 2>&1 | tr ',' '\n' | grep -iE '
input.description: Get artifact filenames via build subcommand

input.command: cd D:/mybot && bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh info REACTOR_SPARK_FW_UPDATER_OSX 2>&1 | tr '{' '\n' | grep -oiE '"name":"[A-Z0-9_]+"|"type":"[A-Za-z]+ParameterDefinition"|"value":"[^"]*"|"buildable":(true|false)' | head -60
input.description: Get Mac OSX job param names and buildable

input.command: cd D:/mybot && for b in 56 55; do echo "=== SPARK_II_FW #$b ==="; bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh build SPARK_II_FW $b 2>&1 | grep -oiE '"(fileName|relativePath|displayName|fullDisplayName)":"[^"]*"|[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+' | head -20; done
input.description: Extract version strings and artifact names from full build JSON

input.command: cd D:/mybot && for b in 87 86 82 81 78 77; do echo "=== SPARK_ESP32_FW #$b ==="; bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh build SPARK_ESP32_FW $b 2>&1 | grep -oiE '"(fileName|relativePath)":"[^"]*"|rev[0-9]+|"description":"[^"]*"' | head -12; done
input.description: Get ESP32 artifact filenames and revs across recent builds

input.command: cd D:/mybot && for b in 76 75 74 73 72 71 70 69 68 67 66 65; do r=$(bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh build SPARK_ESP32_FW $b 2>&1 | grep -oiE 'esp32-fw-spark2-rev[0-9]+\.bin'); if [ -n "$r" ]; then echo "#$b -> $r"; fi; done
input.description: Find previous Spark 2 ESP32 build below #77

input.command: cd D:/mybot && bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh info REACTOR_SPARK_FW_UPDATER_OSX 2>&1 | tr '{' '\n' | grep -A0 -iE 'NOTARIZE|TRIGGERED_BY_WIN' | grep -oiE '"name":"(NOTARIZE|TRIGGERED_BY_WIN)"'; echo "--- defaults ---"; bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh info REACTOR_SPARK_FW_UPDATER_OSX 2>&1 | grep -oiE '"name":"NOTARIZE"[^}]*|NOTARIZE[^}]*value":(true|false)' | head; echo "--- raw notarize block
cd D:/mybot && bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh trigger REACTOR_SPARK_FW_UPDATER_OSX BRANCH=feature/FWP-814-audio-anchor SPARK2_MCU=2.6.2.194 SPARK2_ESP=487 NOTARIZE=true 2>&1 | head -30
input.description: Trigger Mac-only Spark updater build with pinned older versions

input.command: cd D:/mybot && sleep 8; bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh queue 2426 2>&1 | grep -oiE '"why":"[^"]*"|"number":[0-9]+|"url":"[^"]*/[0-9]+/"|"cancelled":(true|false)' | head
input.description: Check queue item for assigned build number

input.command: cd D:/mybot && bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh build REACTOR_SPARK_FW_UPDATER_OSX 26 2>&1 | grep -oiE '"(SPARK2_MCU|SPARK2_ESP|BRANCH|NOTARIZE)","value":"?[^",}]*"?|"(building|result)":[a-zA-Z0-9"]*|"estimatedDuration":[0-9]+' | head -20

cd D:/mybot && for i in $(seq 1 40); do r=$(bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh build REACTOR_SPARK_FW_UPDATER_OSX 26 "tree=building,result" 2>&1 | grep -oiE '"result":"?[A-Za-z]+"?|"building":(true|false)'); if echo "$r" | grep -qiE '"result":"?(SUCCESS|FAILURE|ABORTED|UNSTABLE)'; then echo "DONE: $r"; break; fi; sleep 25; done; echo "=== final ==="; bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh build REACTOR_SP
